title: Retro Bitrate 6
description: A pixelated shader effect displaying a diagonal gradient transition from deep blue in the upper left to bright lime green in the lower right. The image consists of square pixel blocks of varying sizes, creating a mosaic-like appearance with a scale of 41 pixels. The gradient uses a smooth color interpolation through the HSL color space, transitioning from dark forest green (#0f4d12) through cyan and light blue tones to bright yellow-green (#6fe81c). A dithering effect with a Bayer4 pattern is applied using colors #419bd5 (light blue) and #7fdb95 (light green) in screen blend mode, adding subtle texture and color variation across the pixelated surface. The overall effect creates a retro digital aesthetic with a soft, diffused quality despite the hard pixel edges. The spatial composition shows a clear diagonal flow from top-left to bottom-right, with the pixelation creating a blocky, low-resolution appearance reminiscent of early computer graphics or digital art.
